description: Define the formal system prompts and persona constraints for the Orchestrator, Specialized Workers (Statistician, Historian, Writer), and the Skeptic agent.
Design the procedural protocol for the Dialectical Loop, defining the communication schema between the Orchestrator and the Specialized Workers.
Draft the 'Generation Phase' workflow documentation, specifying how Workers access and synthesize domain-specific corpora.
Draft the 'Critique Phase' workflow documentation, detailing the Skeptic agent's criteria for identifying logical fallacies and hallucinations.
Draft the 'Synthesis Phase' workflow documentation, outlining how the Orchestrator reconciles adversarial feedback into a final revision.
Develop the evaluation framework for the Factual Fidelity Score, including the rubric for comparing outputs against ground-truth data.
Develop the Logical Coherence Index rubric for the independent blind-evaluator LLM, ensuring consistent assessment of academic rigor.
Conduct a simulated trial of the Dialectical Loop on a sample scientific research topic to identify potential communication bottlenecks.
Analyze the simulated trial results to identify potential risks of 'consensus bias' where agents overly appease the Skeptic.
Refine the system prompts for the Skeptic agent to ensure high-quality critique without suppressing creative synthesis.
Document the final architecture specifications for the Hierarchical Multi-Agent Orchestration system.
Synthesize the methodological framework into a comprehensive proposal for implementing the dialectical orchestration protocol.
